# 阿鑫个人 IP 配图流程

> Multi-platform Codex/Hermes/Claude/generic-agent skill for generating Axin-style personal IP article illustrations.

This repository contains a reusable illustration workflow for turning personal-brand writing, public-build notes, AI workflow documentation, GitHub README content, and project retrospectives into clean hand-drawn article images.

Default agent behavior:

1. When a user references this skill and pastes an article, read the article first and decide how many images are useful.
2. If the current agent environment has image generation, generate one image per selected scene.
3. If no image generation tool is available, return one complete copyable prompt per selected scene.
4. If the user attaches a custom IP character image, use it as the character reference instead of default Axin.
5. Use the CLI only when the user asks for saved files, batch prompts, or an article package.
6. For Douyin, Xiaohongshu, or short-form carousel posts, use 9:16 vertical cards and call `image_gen` once per card when available.

## Primary Entry Points

- [Quick start](docs/QUICK_START.md): first-run guide for conversational use first, then optional CLI.
- [English quick start](docs/QUICK_START.en.md): English first-run guide for conversational use first, then optional CLI.
- [Sample article](examples/sample-article.md): ready-to-run article for testing the article-to-prompt pipeline.
- [Article diagnosis CLI](scripts/analyze-article.ps1): score whether an article is ready for IP asset generation before creating prompts.
- [Optional semantic review](scripts/lib/SemanticReview.ps1): OpenAI Responses API review for stricter article judgement; enable with `-Semantic`.
- [Skill source](axin-personal-ip-illustrations/SKILL.md): main cross-platform skill instructions.
- [Axin character](axin-personal-ip-illustrations/references/axin-ip.md): default recurring IP and action rules.
- [Style DNA](axin-personal-ip-illustrations/references/style-dna.md): white background, black hand-drawn line art, sparse red/orange/blue notes.
- [Prompt template](axin-personal-ip-illustrations/references/prompt-template.md): reusable image generation prompt with Chinese, English, and sparse bilingual modes.
- [QA checklist](axin-personal-ip-illustrations/references/qa-checklist.md): validation rules.
- [Article package CLI](scripts/new-content-package.ps1): read an article and optional IP character image, then produce content diagnosis, analysis, shot list, image prompts, JSONL prompt jobs, and bilingual distribution notes.
- [Platform guide](docs/MULTI_PLATFORM.md): keep platform product names untranslated; supports `Codex`, `Hermes`, `Claude Code`, `Cursor`, `Windsurf`, `Cline`, `OpenCode`, generic agents.
- [GEO guide](docs/GEO.md): search and generative engine optimization strategy.
- [Content OS](docs/AXIN_CONTENT_OS.md): project-to-content package workflow.
- [Character library](docs/CHARACTER_LIBRARY.md): Axin IP asset board and visual consistency rules.

## Optional

- [Full LLM context](llms-full.txt): longer project summary for agents.
- [Prompt examples](examples/prompts.md): copyable prompts.
- [README](README.md): Chinese human-facing overview and screenshots.
- [README.en](README.en.md): English overview.
